headline: ComplianceCow Announces Integration with ServiceNow Integrated Risk Management to Automate Continuous Control Monitoring for Enterprises
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 16, 2026--ComplianceCow today announced an integration with ServiceNow, the AI control tower for business reinvention, to offer automated, continuous evidence collection, controls testing, remediation and graph analysis for IT and cybersecurity controls.

headline: California Approves First AI Registered Apprenticeship as Creating Coding Careers Secures Dual Federal-State Recognition Across Nine Tech Occupations
